subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Aid me to achieve that which is befitting, O Thou Forgiver! Strengthen me to accomplish that which is worthy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار به آنچه سزاوار است موفّق کن ای آمرزگار به آنچه لايقست مؤيّد فرما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for assistance; intercession
